zh.lifeSummary: 當Ivetta Helgot於1105年出生在英國史洛普爾哈爾時，她的父親William Helgot Sheriff of Nottingham25歲，母親Lady N Helgot21歲。她於1120年與Robert le Boteler在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1130年享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ivetta Helgot于1105年出生在英国史洛普爾哈爾时，她的父亲William Helgot Sheriff of Nottingham25岁，母亲Lady N Helgot21岁。她于1120年与Robert le Boteler在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1130年享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Helgot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from the medieval personal name Helgoth, Helgath, ancient Germanic Hildegaud, composed of the elements hild ‘strife’ + got, an element of uncertain meaning (perhaps a tribal name, from the same word as Goth).

nameMeanings.name: Ivetta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ivatt
meanings: English: relationship name from a pet form of the Old French personal name Iva, feminine form of Ivo. Compare Ive .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ivetta Helgot was born in 1105, in Harley, Shropshire, England, her father, William Helgot Sheriff of Nottingham, was 25 and her mother, Lady N Helgot, was 21. She married Robert le Boteler in 1120, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1130, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ivetta Helgot est née en 1105, à Harley, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Helgot Sheriff of Nottingham, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady N Helgot, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert le Boteler en 1120, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1130, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ivetta Helgot 1105 in Harley, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Helgot Sheriff of Nottingham 25 und ihre Mutter Lady N Helgot 21. Sie hat 1120 in England Robert le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1130 im Alter von 25 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ivetta Helgot è nata il nel 1105 nel Harley, Shropshire, England, sua padre, William Helgot Sheriff of Nottingham, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady N Helgot, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert le Boteler nel 1120, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1130, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ivetta Helgotが1105年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアハーリーで生まれた時，父William Helgot Sheriff of Nottinghamは25歳，母Lady N Helgotは21歳であった。1120年にイギリスでRobert le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1130年に25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ivetta Helgot(이)가 1105년 영국 슈럽실르 하를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Helgot Sheriff of Nottingham(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady N Helgot(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1120년 영국에서 Robert le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1130년 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ingleby, Derbyshire, England, United Kin: Ingleby, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ivetta Helgot nasceu em 1105, em Harley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Helgot Sheriff of Nottingham, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady N Helgot, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert le Boteler em 1120, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1130, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ivetta Helgot родилась в 1105 г. в местности харли, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Helgot Sheriff of Nottingham было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady N Helgot, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert le Boteler в 1120 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1130 г. в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ivetta Helgot nació en 1105, en Harley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Helgot Sheriff of Nottingham, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady N Helgot, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Robert le Boteler en 1120, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1130, a la edad de 25 años.
